title: Suit Usage Distribution
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS switches FROM SwitchSuitLoadout WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT SuitName AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM SwitchSuitLoadout WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY SuitName ORDER BY value DESC

details.text: {switches} suit loadout switch(es) during the report period. Your most-used suit tells your Odyssey story in a single bar — Dominator means soldier, Maverick means rogue operative, Artemis means scientist and explorer; most commanders are a mix and this shows the true balance of your on-foot identity.
details.help: SwitchSuitLoadout SuitName is the base suit type. switches drives the title as the total deployment switches.

tagLines: Suit loadout usage distribution compiled. On-foot deployment class breakdown noted in the Odyssey record.
The suit you wear is the character you're playing. The distribution shows who you are on the ground.
Dominator, Maverick, Artemis. Three philosophies. The bar chart is your personality assessment.
